ddls:
CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday in a standard format */,
  "year_celebrated" INTEGER /* Year the holiday is celebrated */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event celebrated during the holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Official name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., Independence, Cultural) */,
  "significance_level" TEXT /* Level of significance (e.g., National, Regional, Local) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the holiday is celebrated annually */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the holiday record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the holiday record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the holiday record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the country record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the country record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the region record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the region record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the language is spoken */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  "speakers" TEXT /* Number of speakers of the language */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the language record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the language record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the language record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the holiday associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Parade, Festival) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the event record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the event record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the event record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., University, Research Institute) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the user record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday being contributed to */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., Annotation, Update) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Details about the contribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the contribution record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the contribution record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the contribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the category record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the category record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES holiday_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the holiday belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the mapping record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the mapping record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the mapping record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_category_mapping_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES holiday_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_significance" (
  "significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each significance record */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday associated with the significance */,
  "significance_description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday's significance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the significance record */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the significance record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the significance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_significance_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)
